Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Statement Of Damages, Form And Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents And For Award Of Moentary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Devron Char's motion to compel responses to request for statement of damages, form and special interrogatories, and request for production of documents is granted. The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $680 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
